name: I slipped and fell at work in Salt Lake City but it was my own clumsiness - can I still get workers comp?
description: Yes in Utah if work conditions like hard floors made injuries worse, even for idiopathic falls.[3]

mainEntity.name: I slipped and fell at work in Salt Lake City but it was my own clumsiness - can I still get workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes in Utah if work conditions like hard floors made injuries worse, even for idiopathic falls.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Idiopathic falls at work in Utah may be compensable if workplace conditions like a hard floor worsened the injury.[3] You must prove the work environment increased the risk or severity of harm beyond what would occur elsewhere. Key factors: (1) Show the fall originated from a personal condition but work amplified injury; (2) Provide medical evidence linking floor hardness to worse outcome; (3) File claim promptly with Utah Labor Commission; (4) Idiopathic means internal cause, not work-related trigger. Report immediately to employer, seek medical care, and gather witness statements on floor conditions. Consult a workers' comp attorney to appeal denials as courts require proof of actual aggravation.[3]
